issues.title: ReportsPage handles too many responsibilities
issues.description: ReportsPage manages data fetching, export logic, filter state, loading states, and rendering all in one component, violating Single Responsibility Principle.
issues.fix: Extract export logic into a useExportOrders hook

issues.title: handleClear hardcodes all filter field names
issues.description: handleClear() explicitly lists every filter key, meaning adding a new filter requires modifying the component. Violates Open/Closed Principle.
issues.fix: Use Object.keys or pass a filter reset callback from parent; alternatively reset to a typed empty filters object

issues.title: STATUS_COLOR_MAP uses generic string keys instead of OrderStatus type
issues.description: Record<string, string> doesn't enforce that only valid OrderStatus values are keys. The props interface accepts any string status.
issues.fix: Type as Partial<Record<OrderStatus, string>> and type the status prop as OrderStatus

issues.title: Hook mixes data fetching with URL filter state
issues.description: useReportOrders combines useQuery (data fetching) with useQueryStates (URL state management), mixing two concerns in one hook.
issues.fix: Consider separating into useReportFilters (URL state) and useReportOrdersQuery (data fetching) if the hook grows
